title: Howlang
subtitle: A toy programming language with unified mental model
summary: A simple programming language for fun :) Built on the gist of a unified mental model, everything is primitive or callable. I had this idea in 2023 but only realized it with the help of coding agent in 2026.

blocks.text: Howlang is an experimental programming language and interpreter designed to explore a minimalist, function-centric programming model where everything is treated as composable transformations.

The project implements a lightweight interpreter that emphasizes simplicity, expressiveness, and extensibility, serving both as a playground for language design ideas and a foundation for future compiler development.

It includes parsing, execution, and basic runtime features, along with test programs that demonstrate its capability to model complex logic through a concise syntax. Overall, the project aims to investigate alternative abstractions for computation and provide a base for building more advanced language tooling.
